prompt: Create a photorealistic close-up product-style image of a handcrafted wooden travel chessboard on a walnut tabletop. The scene shows exactly 1 folding chessboard made from 2 rectangular wooden halves separated by a narrow central hinge groove, with a checker pattern of exactly 64 raised square tiles in alternating pale maple and dark walnut wood. Add exactly 2 loose accessory pieces beside it: 1 long dark walnut side rail resting parallel to the right edge of the board and 1 flat pale maple wooden strip lying farther right. Include exactly 1 small brass-colored latch or clasp visible on the near front edge of the board. Use warm natural window light from the upper left, shallow depth of field, realistic wood grain, beveled edges, soft shadows, and a cozy workshop or tabletop atmosphere. Camera angle: three-quarter overhead view, slightly tilted, focused on the board surface. Make the board appear like a foldable travel chessboard made of walnut and maple, placed on a walnut table. No chess pieces, no people, no text, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a photorealistic close-up product-style image of a handcrafted wooden travel chessboard on a walnut tabletop. The scene shows exactly 1 folding chessboard made from 2 rectangular wooden halves separated by a narrow central hinge groove, with a checker pattern of exactly 64 raised square tiles in alternating pale maple and dark walnut wood. Add exactly 2 loose accessory pieces beside it: 1 long dark walnut side rail resting parallel to the right edge of the board and 1 flat pale maple wooden strip lying farther right. Include exactly 1 small brass-colored latch or clasp visible on the near front edge of the board. Use warm natural window light from the upper left, shallow depth of field, realistic wood grain, beveled edges, soft shadows, and a cozy workshop or tabletop atmosphere. Camera angle: three-quarter overhead view, slightly tilted, focused on the board surface. Make the board appear like a foldable travel chessboard made of walnut and maple, placed on a walnut table. No chess pieces, no people, no text, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张写实风格的特写产品图，展示放置在胡桃木桌面上的手工木质旅行棋盘。场景中包含 1 个折叠式棋盘，由 2 个长方形木块组成，中间由狭窄的铰链槽隔开，棋盘表面有 64 个凸起的正方形方格，由浅色枫木和深色胡桃木交替排列。在棋盘旁边放置 2 个松散的配件：1 条与棋盘右边缘平行的深色胡桃木侧轨，以及 1 条放置在更右侧的浅色枫木平条。在棋盘靠近前缘的位置展示 1 个小巧的黄铜色锁扣。使用来自左上方的温暖自然窗光，营造浅景深、逼真的木纹、斜面边缘、柔和阴影以及舒适的工作室或桌面氛围。拍摄角度：四分之三俯视视角，略微倾斜，焦点对准棋盘表面。使棋盘看起来像是由 折叠式旅行棋盘 制成，材质为 胡桃木 和 枫木，放置在 胡桃木桌子 上。画面中不包含棋子、人物、文字或水印。
